overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a medieval RPG. The player character walks through a candlelit stone corridor, exits into a moonlit historic village square, and passes a villager carrying a basket. The environment features detailed historic European architecture with warm interior lighting transitioning to cool night lighting outdoors.

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the stone corridor, observing the candlelit window and glancing into an interior room

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone wall with weathered texture
small arched window with iron bars containing a lit candle
open doorway revealing a room with wooden bed and floor lamp
dark arched doorway at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow stone corridor illuminated by warm candlelight from a barred window. An open doorway reveals a furnished interior room with a wooden bed, while the corridor continues toward a distant archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with brick pillar accents

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the corridor wall with hand occasionally touching the stone surface, approaching the exit

entered.detail: wall section with red brick pattern at the base
stack of wooden planks leaning against the corridor wall
large stone archway leading to the outside

segments.scene_description: The player continues through the corridor past brick-accented walls and stacked wooden planks, approaching a large stone archway that marks the exit to the outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: village entrance archway with market cart

events.description: passing through the stone archway from indoor corridor to outdoor village square
lighting shifts from warm artificial candlelight to cool blue moonlight

agents.ego_description: passing through the exit archway into the village square while a villager approaches from the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: villager in medieval dress carrying a large basket of produce walking toward the camera

entered.detail: wooden cart with produce visible on the right side of the archway
exterior facade of a stone building visible through the archway
open dirt square of the medieval village visible beyond the archway

segments.scene_description: The player exits the building through the stone archway, transitioning from warm interior lighting to the cool moonlit village square. A villager carrying a basket of produce walks toward the player and passes by, while wooden market carts line the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village square with timber-framed buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the village square past wooden carts and historic buildings, exploring the night-time environment

entered.detail: large historic building with timber framing and white plaster walls
wooden wagon with canvas cover parked on the dirt road
unpaved dirt and cobblestone road leading through the village

segments.scene_description: The player explores the open village square under the night sky, moving past timber-framed buildings and stationary wooden carts. The environment is quiet and empty, with the path leading deeper into the medieval settlement between historic structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the warm, enclosed confines of a candlelit stone corridor into the cool, expansive atmosphere of a moonlit medieval village square. It begins by gliding through a narrow hallway illuminated by candlelight, passing a barred window and an open doorway that reveals a furnished bedroom. As the camera moves past brick-accented walls and stacked wooden planks, the corridor opens up toward a large stone archway. The scene then shifts abruptly from warm interior tones to the blue hues of night as the camera exits the building, passing wooden market carts and a villager carrying a basket of produce. Finally, the view expands into the quiet settlement, moving between timber-framed buildings and stationary carts under a clear night sky.
